name: MessageGuard ML
description: Uses a DistilBERT token-classification model to detect and redact secrets in outgoing messages.

enabled.label: Enable MessageGuard ML
enabled.help: When disabled, outgoing messages are not scanned by the ML classifier.

modelId.label: Model ID
modelId.help: Hugging Face model repo ID used for token classification.

threshold.label: Detection threshold
threshold.help: Only predictions at or above this confidence are redacted.

mask.label: Redaction token
mask.help: Replacement text used for detected sensitive spans.
